---
params:
  project_id: "2026-04-MIC"
  folder: "projects/2026-03-MIC"
  anon: TRUE
  by_role: FALSE
output: 
  rmdformats::robobook:
    toc_depth: 3
title: "Applications for project `r toupper(params$project_id)`"
---
<!-- THIS FILE IS NOT SUPPOSED TO BE KNITTED DIRECTLY
    INSTEAD IT IS KNIT FROM _targets.R
    IF YOU WANT TO KNIT THIS BY HAND, SET THE PARAMETERS ACCORDINGLY
-->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
```

```{r setup-data-report, include=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(correltools)
library(ggplot2)
library(forcats)


roles_df <- readr::read_csv(here::here(params$folder, "data/gs_upload.csv")) 
roles_df <- roles_df %>% 
  filter(project_id == params$project_id) %>% 
  select(applicant_id, gender, project_id, project_role) 
```

**Report metadata**:

- time generated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y-%m-%d, %H:%m:%S UTC%z')`
- applications included: `r unique(roles_df$applicant_id) %>% length()`

# Introduction
### Helpful links for team selection committee
- [Team selection criteria and best practices](https://docs.correlaid.org/project-manual/project-coordinators/ideation-finding-a-team#team-selection-call)
- [Explanation of the experience scale](https://docs.correlaid.org/project-manual/data4good-projects#experience-scale) ("Beginner", "User", "Advanced", "Expert") 


```{r knit-single, results='asis', echo=FALSE}

if (params$by_role) {
  for (project_role in (roles_df$project_role %>% unique())) {
    cat(sprintf("# %s\n", project_role))
    
    # only applications for this role
    appl_sorted <- roles_df %>% 
      dplyr::filter(project_role == .env$project_role) %>% 
      arrange(gender, applicant_id)

      res <- lapply(appl_sorted$applicant_id, function(id) {
        params <- list(applicant_id = id, project_id = params$project_id, folder = params$folder, by_role = params$by_role, role = project_role)
        knitr::knit_child(
          'template_application_single.Rmd', envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE
        )
      })
    cat(unlist(res), sep = '\n')
  }
} else {

  # only applications for this role
  appl_sorted <- roles_df %>% 
    distinct(gender, applicant_id) %>% 
    arrange(gender, applicant_id)
    
  res <- lapply(appl_sorted$applicant_id, function(id) {
    params <- list(applicant_id = id, project_id = params$project_id, folder = params$folder, by_role = params$by_role)
    knitr::knit_child(
      'template_application_single.Rmd', envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE
    )
  })
  cat(unlist(res), sep = '\n')
}



```
